// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace IconifyBundle;

/// <summary>Strongly typed access to the <c>feather</c> Iconify pack.</summary>
public static class Feather
{
    static readonly global::IconifyBundle.IconPack pack =
        global::IconifyBundle.IconPack.ForAssembly(typeof(Feather).Assembly, "feather");

    public static global::IconifyBundle.Icon Activity => pack["activity"];
    public static global::IconifyBundle.Icon AlertCircle => pack["alert-circle"];

    /// <summary>The on-disk path of the named icon (present only when the consumer set <c>IconifyBundleExtractDisk</c>).</summary>
    public static string PathOf(string name) => pack.PathOf(name);
}
